zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud St Philbert於大約1327年出生在英國波克夏伊頓 海斯廷斯時，她的父親John St Philibert36歲，母親Ada Botetourt34歲。她於1341年之前與Warin de Trussell結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1419年在英國素福爾可可斯福德享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud St Philbert于大约1327年出生在英国波克夏伊頓 海斯廷斯时，她的父亲John St Philibert36岁，母亲Ada Botetourt34岁。她于1341年之前与Warin de Trussell结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1419年在英国素福爾可可斯福德享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Philbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique.  German Kurt.
French and German (Bavaria): from the personal name Philbert, from ancient Germanic Filuberht (see Philibert ).

variants.name: Philibert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Fernand, Mirielle, Pascale, Pierrot.

French: from the personal name Philibert, from ancient Germanic Filuberht, composed of the elements fila ‘much, very’ + berht ‘bright’, which was borne by a 7th-century Christian saint, abbot of Jumièges. The spelling has been influenced by personal names of Greek origin based on philein ‘to love’, e.g. Philip .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud St Philbert was born about 1327, in Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England, her father, John St Philibert, was 36 and her mother, Ada Botetourt, was 34. She married Warin de Trussell before 1341. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1419, in Cosford, Suffolk, England, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud St Philbert est née environ 1327, à Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, John St Philibert, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ada Botetourt, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Warin de Trussell avant 1341. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1419, à Cosford, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud St Philbert um 1327 in Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John St Philibert 36 und ihre Mutter Ada Botetourt 34. Sie hat vor 1341 Warin de Trussell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1419 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Cosford, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud St Philbert è nata il circa 1327 nel Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England, sua padre, John St Philibert, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Ada Botetourt, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Warin de Trussell prima del 1341. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1419, nel Cosford, Suffolk, England, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud St Philbertが約1327年にイギリスバークシュアイアエアトン ハスティングズで生まれた時，父John St Philibertは36歳，母Ada Botetourtは34歳であった。1341年以前にWarin de Trussellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1419年にイギリススフォルクコスフォードで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud St Philbert(이)가 대략 1327년 영국 버크실르 이턴 하스틴그스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John St Philibert(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada Botetourt(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1341년 이전 Warin de Trussell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1419년 영국 수폴크 코스퍼드에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud St Philbert nasceu aproximadamente 1327, em Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John St Philibert, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ada Botetourt, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Warin de Trussell antes 1341. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1419, em Cosford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud St Philbert родилась около 1327 г. в местности эатон хастингс, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John St Philibert было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada Botetourt, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Warin de Trussell перед 1341 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1419 г. в местности косфорд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud St Philbert nació aproximadamente 1327, en Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John St Philibert, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ada Botetourt, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Warin de Trussell antes de 1341. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1419, en Cosford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años.
